boundary: release smoke status is offline installability and artifact-parity evidence only; it does not validate PyPI trusted publishing, contact PyPI/TestPyPI, run Sigstore, or claim Terminal-Bench benchmark reproduction

checks.detail: wheel path points to one built .whl file
checks.name: wheel_path

checks.detail: source distribution path is absent or points to an existing file
checks.name: sdist_path

checks.detail: canonical audit hash fixture is readable
checks.name: canonical_audit_hash_fixture

checks.detail: release provenance manifest verifies against local artifacts
checks.name: provenance_verify

checks.detail: release provenance signature verifies when supplied
checks.name: provenance_signature_verify

checks.detail: pip upgrades inside the isolated virtual environment
checks.name: pip_upgrade

checks.detail: built wheel installs inside the isolated virtual environment
checks.name: wheel_install

checks.detail: installed public API imports from the isolated virtual environment
checks.name: installed_imports

checks.detail: installed CLI reads the generated audit trajectory
checks.name: installed_audit_trajectory

checks.detail: installed audit-summary CLI does not claim benchmark reproduction
checks.name: installed_audit_summary_boundary

checks.detail: installed demo audit tree hash matches the canonical fixture
checks.name: canonical_audit_hash_compare
